data.title: Agilis and Elemica launch integrated digital commerce platform for chemicals
data.description: Elemica CEO Paul Carriero said the platform addresses a gap between digital storefronts and back-end execution systems.

data.title: QXO CEO Brad Jacobs charts digital overhaul to drive post-Beacon growth
data.description: “We’re building best-in-class platforms across the stack, from CRM and pricing engines to ecommerce and BI tools,” CEO Brad Jacobs said

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: How Ulta Beauty is using AI
data.description: While planning ahead for AI agents, Ulta Beauty has been building up a portfolio of AI startup investments that have shaped how it uses AI for personalization and other user cases.

data.title: Ace Hardware offers same-day delivery through DoorDash
data.description: It joins a growing list of retailers including Sephora, Best Buy and Dollar Tree — as well as independent grocers — using third-party platforms DoorDash, Uber Eats and Instacart for same-day delivery.

data.title: Albertsons becomes first retailer to use Google Cloud's new conversational AI solution
data.description: The retailer shared early results that it has seen in orders and engagement from Ask AI, the platform that uses Google Cloud's conversational commerce agent technology.
